quote: Peace is not the absence of storm, but the lighthouse built on the bedrock of justice.
explanation: True peace is not merely the quiet after a struggle, but a deliberate construction founded on fairness and equity for all. It is the steadfast beacon that guides society through adversity, ensuring no one is left in the dark and shining brightest when truth prevails.
caption:
Peace is not the absence of storm, but the lighthouse built on the bedrock of justice.

True peace is not merely the quiet after a struggle, but a deliberate construction founded on fairness and equity for all. It is the steadfast beacon that guides society through adversity, ensuring no one is left in the dark and shining brightest when truth prevails.

#Cogentic #JalteDiyeFoundation #PeaceAndJustice #SocialCohesion #EthicalAI
